name: Versandhndlsges Ne
summary: Versandhndlsges Ne operates as a mail order company which offers a range of merchandise, novelty goods and promotional products through catalogues. In addition, the company operates in related businesses, such as selling advertising space on the packaging of its mailed products and providing complementary advertising agency services (design, text and graphics). The company operates an Automatic Call Distribution System (ACD), which increases the efficiency of phone-order intake. The company is based in Neum√ºnster, Germany.
